title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
description_snippet: Design and develop embedded control systems for agricultural equipment. CAN/J1939, RTOS, C/C++ required. Experience with MATLAB/Simulink preferred.

title: Firmware Engineer - Industrial Controls
description_snippet: Develop firmware for next-generation industrial automation controllers. SPI, I2C, FreeRTOS experience preferred.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
description_snippet: Work on vehicle control systems for specialty vehicles. CAN bus, embedded Linux, C/C++.

title: Controls Software Engineer
description_snippet: Develop control algorithms for agricultural sprayers and tractors. MATLAB/Simulink, J1939, embedded C.

title: Embedded Software Developer
description_snippet: Firmware development for hydraulic control systems. FreeRTOS, CAN, safety-critical systems.

title: Senior Firmware Engineer
description_snippet: IoT edge device firmware development. BLE, embedded Linux, sensor integration, CI/CD pipelines.

title: Embedded Software Engineer II
description_snippet: Embedded controls for heavy machinery. CAN/J1939, STM32, RTOS, model-based development.

title: Software Engineer - Embedded Systems
description_snippet: Medical device embedded software. C/C++, RTOS, safety-critical development, SPI/I2C.
